answers: Interview prep: research company, practice common questions (STAR method), prepare questions to ask, and dress appropriately.
STAR method: Situation, Task, Action, Result. Use for behavioral questions like 'Tell me about a time when...'
Tips: arrive 10 min early, bring copies of resume, maintain eye contact, and send thank-you email within 24 hours.
Common questions: tell me about yourself, why this company, greatest strength/weakness, where do you see yourself in 5 years.

About interview: Interview prep: research the company thoroughly, practice STAR-format answers, arrive early, dress professionally, and always send a thank-you emai...

feelings.question: job interview er preparation ki?
feelings.answer: Answer: To prepare for a job interview, research the company and its products/services, practice common questions (STAR method), dress appropriately, arrive 10 minutes early, bring copies of your resume and any relevant documents, maintain eye contact throughout the interview, and send thank-you emails within 24 hours.
